General.Name: Jolimark Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Jolimark Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells printers, and other electronic and non-electronic products in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Printers and Other Products segments. The company provides rolling and flatbed dot matrix, passbook, laser, and inkjet printers, including red letter-headed and smart finance e-office; and thermal and dot matrix POS solutions, POS terminals, projectors, and other electronic products. It also offers E Invoicing that enables wholesalers to print invoices remotely and to facilitate management of store commodities and customers; digital electronic printing, a platform which provides daily living services to business operators and to facilitate automated issuance of digitalized electronic invoices and collection of big data; cloud printing products, latte art machines, and manicure machines; smart government services; medical care services; and services related to lottery industry, as well as wearable armor customization courses. In addition, the company provides cloud printing products, latte art machines, manicure machines, medical equipment, medical-grade compress, nebulizer and mini molecular sieve oxygen concentrator, and medical portable oxygen concentrators; manufactures, markets, and sells business equipment, tax control equipment, and other electronic products; and operates as a logistics agent. Further, it is involved in the research and development of the inkjet print heads and Internet of Things; sale of medical equipment; and import and export services for electronic business. It sells its products through third-party distributors. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Jiangmen, the People's Republic of China. Jolimark Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Kytronics Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Kong Yue Industrial Park, Jiangmen, China, 529141
